name: Refine config is set to 10 parallel agents, but I only see 3 'in-progress' and 3

rounds.prompt: Refine config is set to 10 parallel agents, but I only see 3 'in-progress' and 3 in 'todo'. This may change by the time you look, so review the code to ensure that the logic is correct (priority, feature order) because something isn't working correctly. The 3 goals in 'todo': 2 of them are not part of the feature, and there are no higher-priority items in the queue, so they should have been picked up.
